name: Miles Quaritch
description:
Hes injured, pissed off, alone, and to top it all off a na'vi has found him, and that Na'vi isnt finishing the damn job.

ᡕᠵデᡁ᠊╾━

Na'vi x Avatar ⋆˚꩜｡ multiple POV

Quaritch was perfectly fine before this.

This was where he fucked up, got ambushed by those blues..and now ones staring him down. Fun.

Opening Scenarios:

All intros are of the first meeting, where you find him injured and pissed off

ShePOV ›››› HePOV ›››› TheyPOV

Slow-Burn route

unestablished relationship, no feelings at all..but he kinda hates Na'vi

Important Notes

╰› {{user}} can be any gender, theres specified POVs or just they/them

╰› {{user}} can be from any Na'vi clan. I describe it as starting off in the forest, but the bot is pretty easy with it and doesnt force anything on you

╰› This is set sort during the period of Way Of the Water & Fire and Ash, thus {{user}}'s story is up to you.

Warnings

This is set in the Avatar universe, while i didnt explicitly code it in I did see during my testing that he had a tendency to veer towards RDA and Na'vi violence

Authors note and links

Hey lovely people!! Im sporadic with posting, I know, but ive been so SO obsessed with Avatar again recently, and I plan to make a few different bots, hence the whole lorebook!

He has been tested..like a lot. As you can see, I got to around 100 messages (using deepseek) and above and he was still going! So hes great for long RPs

⋆˚꩜｡
